title: Cocoa Crazy
description: Enough chocolate to make you go Cocoa Crazy!
body:
# Enough chocolate to make you go Cocoa Crazy!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/84o0DXjb/images/4e7ed9a2b826b2a5c6f7da1ff66c7d4d5bc2fcb7.png)

# Adds food items, such as:
- Chocolate
- Dark Chocolate
- White Chocolate
- Cocoa Butter
- Hot Cocoa
- Chocolate Cake


# Chocolate Blocks!
- Chocolate Blocks
- Chocolate Stairs
- Chocolate Slabs
- Chocolate Walls

To get started on making chocolate, roast some cocoa beans in a furnace.
